title: <div>   - List every named object, concept, alias, symbol, structure, or rule me
content:
- List every named object, concept, alias, symbol, structure, or rule mentioned here
- These go into the master `symbolbank`, `namebank`, or `structurebank`
- Include notes on style, version, origin, use-case

5. 🧱 FRAMEWORK + STRUCTURE EXTRACTION
- Pull any structural rules, rituals, file systems, workflows, naming conventions
- Route these to `01_PROMPT_Library/`, `gpt_exports/`, or `master_index`

6. 🗂 ARCHIVE ROUTING
- Suggest filename + folder path inside `_ARCHIVE_ROOT_2025/`
- Classify: `active_sandbox`, `cold_storage`, `final_export`, or `discarded_ritual_log`
- Status: active | archived | deprecated | absorbed

7. 🧾 EXPORTABLE OUTPUT
- Provide a Markdown `.md` or `.txt` file with clean structure
- Include metadata block:
```
---
title: [Thread Title or Function]
first_date: [Earliest message date]
version: v1.0
status: [active, archived, deprecated, etc.]
context: From document: 🧠 THREAD MINING PROMPT (v2): — chunk 2 (chunk 2/3)
